headings.usage: H1-H3, massive tablet row titles, bold metric numbers

colors.contrast_rules: Signal colors (Yellow, Green) must have #0A0A0A (black) text for APCA contrast compliance. Red must have #FFFFFF text.

tablet_task_row.style: bg-surface-light dark:bg-surface-dark border border-border-light dark:border-border-dark flex flex-row items-stretch
tablet_task_row.behavior: Grid layout. Col 1: Time (h-full border-r). Col 2: Task Info (Haus/Station/Desc). Col 3: Actions.
tablet_task_row.typography: Time: Cabinet Grotesk text-4xl. Info: IBM Plex text-xl.

tablet_action_button.style: h-20 px-8 text-2xl font-bold uppercase tracking-wide transition-colors active:scale-95 border-l border-border-light dark:border-border-dark

admin_form_input.style: h-14 bg-surface-light border border-border-light rounded-none text-base px-4 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500
admin_form_input.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-text-secondary-light mb-2 block

tablet_background_light.description: Minimalist frosted glass abstract background for light theme tablet UI. High end clean aesthetic.

tablet_background_dark.description: Dark industrial abstract background, brushed steel and matte panels for dark theme tablet UI.

motion_interactions.modals: entry: slide-up with fade (Framer Motion: y: [50, 0], opacity: [0, 1], duration: 0.3, ease: 'easeOut')
motion_interactions.task_rows: entry: stagger children (Framer Motion: delayChildren: 0.1, staggerChildren: 0.05)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over Signal Yellow (#FFD600) and Signal Green (#00E676) is #0A0A0A. Text over Red (#FF3B30) must be #FFFFFF.
accessibility.touch_targets: Tablet mode requires minimum 80x80px interactive areas.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement two separate responsive view modes toggled via routing or device detection: Admin Mode (compact/mobile) and Tablet Mode (wall-mounted layout).
Use Phosphor Icons (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react) for sharp, technical iconography.
Do NOT use generic rounded borders (rounded-lg) globally. The aesthetic is 'Swiss High-Contrast' - stick to sharp edges (rounded-none) or very subtle 2px radii for structural tension.

For the Tablet view, implement the customizable background feature using the provided high-end abstract media URLs. When these backgrounds are active, use a strong translucent overlay (e.g. bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md) on containers to guarantee data legibility.
Strictly follow the German label requirements: Annehmen, Nicht annehmbar, Nicht beendet, Beenden, Nicht erledigt. No English fallbacks for the UI.
